# Resources.ResourceReadInternalErrorCode field

The code a server SHOULD return for an internal failure UNRELATED to the validity of the requested `uri` (e.g. a backing store is unreachable): `-32603` (Internal error). (§17.6, R-17.6-d)

public const int ResourceReadInternalErrorCode;
